title: Mumbai Indians Fall Short Against RCB in High-Scoring IPL Clash
description: In a thrilling IPL 2026 match, Mumbai Indians fell short against Royal Challengers Bengaluru by 18 runs. Captain Hardik Pandya expressed concerns over the team's performance, highlighting the need for strategic reassessment. Despite a strong start in their chase, MI struggled with timely wickets, ultimately finishing at 222 runs. Sherfane Rutherford's explosive innings provided a glimmer of hope, but it wasn't enough to secure victory. RCB's aggressive batting led them to a commanding total of 240 runs, marking their third win in four matches this season. Read on for a detailed analysis of the match and insights from the players.

title: 14 killed, 63 infected as lassa fever spreads across North Central Nigeria
description: ...Frontline workers heavily impacted by surg Lassa fever is an acute viral disease endemic in parts of West Africa, transmitted primarily through contact with food or household items contaminated by urine or faeces of infected rodents, particularly the multimammate rat. title: Chester Hills row: Former RERA chief accuses Chief Secy of ‘illegal orders’
